 class MLP(nn.Module):

         super().__init__()

+        hidden = int(mlp_mult * dim * 2 // 3)

         self.proj._zero_init = True
     def forward(self, x: Tensor) -> Tensor:
-        x = torch.relu(self.fc(x))
-        return self.proj(x.square())
+        return self.proj(F.silu(self.gate(x)) * self.up(x))
